tech_news.description: The Xbox Series S is taking some heat once again following comments made by the founder of Moon Studio, the team behind action RPG No Rest for the Wicked.

tech_news.title: Valve says it’s ready to launch the Steam Machine this summer - The Verge
tech_news.description: Valve now says that the delayed Steam Machine PC and Steam Frame VR headset are set to launch sometime this summer. Both devices will also have Verified programs to signify games that run well.

tech_news.title: Satya Nadella ‘Not Sure’ Who Said Microsoft Wanted to Make Addictive AI, Is Looking for Guy Who Did This - 404 Media
tech_news.description: Microsoft's CEO seems unaware of what's going on at his own company.

tech_news.title: Filtr is a new privacy tool that blocks ads in almost every iPhone and Mac app - TechCrunch
tech_news.description: This popular ad blocker app for iPhones, iPads, and Macs can now block ads from loading inside apps, including web browsers, thanks to a new feature in the latest Apple software.

tech_news.title: Cyberdecks used to look like little laptops, but now they’re getting more personal - The Verge
tech_news.description: Creative cyberdecks are popping up across social media, and they don’t look like laptops anymore — they’re art projects made from purses, jewelry boxes, and toys.
